backend_status.message: MolScribe 已配置；模型将在第一次真实识别时延迟加载。

torch.note: UI 状态页不导入 PyTorch；请用 scripts/verify_gpu_environment.py 验证 CUDA。

metadata.limitations: Metrics depend on the configured external OCSR backend and dataset quality.

ensemble.improvement_claim: No accuracy improvement is claimed unless benchmark data shows ensemble_only_correct_count exceeds ensemble_missed_available_correct_count on a representative dataset.
